title: Pezzulo Levin Bootstrap PASS: 7-stage intelligence pipeline maps to QA architecture levels
_fixture_purpose: Certifies that Pezzulo & Levin's 7-stage bootstrapping pipeline (Chemistry -> Metabolic -> Transcriptional -> Anatomical -> Behavioral -> Abstract -> Creativity) maps to QA architecture levels with increasing operator complexity. Intelligence ratchet = Pisano fixed point pi(9)=24 [192]. Five design principles map to QA axioms/operations.
source_attribution: Giovanni Pezzulo & Michael Levin, 'Bootstrapping Life-Inspired Machine Intelligence: Mechanisms, Design Principles, and Open Problems' (arXiv:2602.08079, Feb 2026). QA formalization: Will Dale + Claude, 2026-04-05.

stage_mapping.description: Chemical substrate provides discrete states. QA: states in {1,...,N}, never {0,...,N-1}. The no-zero axiom is the algebraic analog of chemistry providing a non-trivial ground state.
Metabolic cycles = single-step Fibonacci iteration. The fundamental dynamical unit: (b,e) -> (e, (b+e) mod m). Energy cycling within a fixed state.
Gene regulatory networks select between programs. QA: the 3-adic valuation of the norm f(b,e) = b*b+b*e-e*e classifies states into orbit families. This is the first structural differentiation.

Large-scale body plan = orbit topology. The three orbit families (cosmos/satellite/singularity) define the anatomical layout. E8 alignment measures how close a tuple configuration is to the maximal exceptional symmetry.

Behavior = observable outputs. QA: the observer projection firewall (Theorem NT) maps discrete QA states to continuous measurements. This is the boundary between internal dynamics and external behavior — crossed exactly twice.

Abstraction = operating across orbit families within a modulus. Bateson Level-II: the agent can change which orbit it occupies, selecting different behavioral programs. Multi-modulus reasoning compares S_9 and S_24 structures.

Creativity = escaping the current state space entirely. QA: Level-III modulus change (S_9 -> S_24 via Pisano bridge pi(9)=24). The intelligence ratchet: once the system discovers the Pisano fixed point, it cannot unknow it — pi(24)=24 is self-referential.

intelligence_ratchet.description: The transition from Stage 6 to Stage 7 (creativity) is irreversible because pi(24)=24 is a fixed point. Once the system reaches modulus 24, further Pisano iteration stays at 24. This is the algebraic formalization of Pezzulo & Levin's observation that intelligence, once bootstrapped, becomes self-sustaining.
intelligence_ratchet.dual_extremality: m=24 is simultaneously the minimum non-trivial Pisano FP and the maximum Carmichael lambda=2 modulus — the ratchet locks at the unique joint extremal point.

design_principle_mapping.pezzulo_description: Agents must be autonomous — self-governing, not externally programmed
design_principle_mapping.qa_mapping: A1 (No-Zero): states are intrinsic {1,...,N}, not assigned from outside. The system's ground state is self-determined.

design_principle_mapping.pezzulo_description: Complex structures emerge from local interactions without global blueprint
design_principle_mapping.qa_mapping: Orbit emergence: three orbit families arise from Fibonacci dynamics alone — no explicit encoding of cosmos/satellite/singularity. Geometry is emergent.

design_principle_mapping.pezzulo_description: Agents can rebuild after damage, returning to the target morphology
design_principle_mapping.qa_mapping: T1 (Path Time): QA time = integer path length k. Regeneration = re-traversing the orbit from a perturbed state. The orbit is an attractor; perturbations decay back to the cycle.

design_principle_mapping.pezzulo_description: Development = solving a constraint satisfaction problem over morphospace
design_principle_mapping.qa_mapping: S1+S2 (No **2, No float state): QA constraints are exact integer arithmetic. No floating-point drift, no ULP errors. The constraint space is discrete and exactly solvable.

design_principle_mapping.pezzulo_description: Cells communicate via bioelectric, chemical, and mechanical signals
design_principle_mapping.qa_mapping: Resonance coupling: np.einsum('ik,jk->ij', tuples, tuples). Signal injection enters via b state, influences coupling before propagation. Bidirectional: signal affects coupling, coupling affects evolution.

cross_references.name: QA Bateson Learning Levels
cross_references.relation: 7 stages map to Bateson levels L_0 through L_3; stage transitions = level promotions

cross_references.name: QA Dual Extremality 24
cross_references.relation: Intelligence ratchet = Pisano fixed point; Stage 7 creativity locks at m=24
